001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder.StockHolderEvent;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007/**
008 * A {@link StockHolderEvent} called when the stock of the {@link StockHolder} is modified.
009 * <p>
010 * You need to be very careful not to call methods that cause changes to a {@link StockHolder} in the event,
011 * as this may result in an infinite loop.
012 */
013// TODO: move StockEvent classes to api.event.stockholder in version 5.0.0
014public class StockEvent extends StockHolderEvent {
015
016    /**
017     * The constructor of {@link StockEvent}.
018     *
019     * @param stockHolder the stockholder of the event
020     */
021    public StockEvent(@NotNull StockHolder stockHolder) {
022        super(stockHolder);
023    }
024}
